chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-772 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.3495/2021 3. For hearing of main case 30-08-2023 Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’ Deputy Attorney General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel submits that about six months ago petitioners had taken away file from his office and they are not in contact with them. For the last six months the petitioners have failed to pursue this petition, even today none is present on behalf of the petitioners therefore, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
